title: Mac mini M4 Pro — local inference setup
body_markdown:
## Mac mini M4 Pro — local inference setup

### Why this machine
64 GB unified RAM fits 70B Q4 models fully in memory. 12 CPU + 16 GPU
cores handle extraction workloads without fan noise. 2 TB storage
holds the catalog, vault, wiki outputs, and model weights with room.

### Intended role
Dedicated inference server on the local network. Headless. All three
pipelines dispatch to it for model calls; laptop is just the client.

### Open questions
- Tailscale vs. local-only — probably local-only
- Power budget — idle ~5W, active ~60W, fine
